steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
From $\frac{x}{y} = 3$, we get $x = 3y$. Substitute into the second equation:
$$\frac{2(3y)}{ty} = 18 \implies \frac{6y}{ty} = 18 \implies \frac{6}{t} = 18$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice A, $\frac{1}{3}$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
